case_title: 709 GEARY STREET LLC VS. MONICA TOMICH ET AL

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-09-2018 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT MONICA TOMICH'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION AS TO JURY FEES. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT TOMICH, MONICA
FEES NOT PAID. FILING OF ANSWER BY DEFENDANT MONICA TOMICH ON 4/16/18 IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 709 GEARY STREET LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOMICH, MONICA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 709 GEARY STREET, #103, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMESIS INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE OF CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON MAY-09-2018 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT MONICA TOMICH'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE WITH A DEFERRED PAYMENT THAT IS DUE BY 6/4/18 OR BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, WHICHEVER ONE HAPPENS FIRST. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
